THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEEKS ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA ORION PACIFIC $1,450.91 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,490.91, PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THE DEFENDANT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE DAMAGE TO HER AUTOMOBILE.
